files.models.py:
"""Data models — generated by BackendAgent."""
from __future__ import annotations
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from datetime import datetime
from typing import Optional
import uuid


@dataclass
class Order:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    user_id: str = ""
    items: list[dict] = field(default_factory=list)
    total: float = 0.0
    status: str = ""
    created_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"Order(id={self.id!r})"

@dataclass
class Payment:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    order_id: str = ""
    amount: float = 0.0
    currency: str = ""
    status: str = ""
    processed_at: Optional[datetime] = None

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"Payment(id={self.id!r})"

@dataclass
class Invoice:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    order_id: str = ""
    amount: float = 0.0
    issued_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)
    due_at: datetime = field(default_factory=datetime.utcnow)

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"Invoice(id={self.id!r})"

@dataclass
class Customer:
    id: str = field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()))
    name: str = ""
    email: str = ""
    phone: Optional[str] = None

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"Customer(id={self.id!r})"

@dataclass
class Profile:
    user_id: str = ""
    display_name: str = ""
    bio: str = ""
    avatar_url: Optional[str] = None

    def __repr__(self) -> str:
        return f"Profile(id={self.id!r})"
